title: Une femme à kosyam
subTitle: Before Kosyam. Defying all predictions, Suzanne wins the presidency of Burkina Faso. The first woman to come to power, she embodies the hope of renewal for her country. Shortly after her election, a massive oil field is discovered.

title: TV5 Monde
subTitle: On 28 February 1985, in Meudon Forest, a Citroën 2CV caught fire. Inside, 61-year-old Evelyne died, while her husband Bruno escaped unharmed. Suspected of killing his wife, Bruno was convicted.

subTitle: The team visit a steampunk enthusiast's timeless, fantastical world, before moving on to a former groundskeeper's cemetery apartment.

title: Dogmatix And The Indomitables

title: TV5 Monde
subTitle: A sheep announces that something is going to happen, but no one knows what it is.

title: TV5 Monde
subTitle: It is April Fools' Day. Lucas plays an innocent prank on Fringale, but the rest of the family is not amused. Among trolls, pranks are considered serious business.

title: TV5 Monde
subTitle: The Kiddycrunchers are a family of Trolls who have been forced to leave their home under the bridge and move into the Shoebox Housing Project to Iive amongst human beings! They discover community life and find that it isn't easy to live amongst these scrumptious creatures with their odd ways!

title: TV5 Monde
subTitle: Anna is about to reconnect with the son she was forced to place for adoption almost 20 years ago. Unable to go through with the meeting, she finds refuge in the basement of an elderly couple and forms a relationship with Victorine.

title: TV5 Monde
subTitle: In New France, before the conquest, Marie works as a native slave for a surgeon. Her life is monotonous and hard. When she meets a girl she considers her own daughter, it's the spark that drives her to radical action.

title: Piscine Pro
subTitle: With a degree in history and civilisation, Charles-Olivier is struggling to find a job in his field. He eventually takes a job as a clerk in a swimming pool shop. With his spirits low, he's getting by as best he can.

title: Marianne, One of a Kind!
subTitle: The remains of a train driver have been found on a railway line. All the clues point to him having been knocked unconscious then placed on the rails whilst waiting for a train to pass. Investigating the case, Marianne finds each new detail.

title: TV5 Monde
subTitle: Malik, Daouda's oldest son, wants to marry Mariama. A meeting is organized between the two families. Daouda discovers that they belong to different social classes: he is one of the narrators, the other family is noble.

title: TV5 Monde
subTitle: During his mission to restore peace to the city of Mboa Matanda, General Dibombè meets the man who murdered his family.

title: TV5 Monde
subTitle: Marianne, Léon's mother has died. Now he has to move to Montreal to live with Francis, his biological father. Fortunately his grandfather Bernard will be at his side during this painful ordeal.

title: TV5 Monde
subTitle: Léon visits his new secondary school to finalise his admission with the headmaster. Meanwhile Francis realises that he'll have to make some changes in the house to make life easier for Léon.

title: TV5 Monde
subTitle: It's Léon's first day at school, and his French teacher is convinced he'll be an asset for the class. Léon meets Florence, a pupil suffering from cystic fibrosis.

subTitle: Ricardo has to choose a member of his family who inspires him for a French project, which leads him to question his mother about his biological father. Léon learns a little more about the relationship between his parents.

title: Olivia
subTitle: In a boarding school for young girls near Fontainebleau, Olivia, a young English girl, is upset by the headmistress, Miss Julie. Miss Cara, the mathematics teacher, strongly opposes her colleague's attitude towards the pupils.
